html:
Exclusive to:

Shroom Skin is an Item found in Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is dropped by Toadstool at 70% and 40% health. Misery Toadstool drops an additional Shroom Skin at 20% health. A skin also has a 20% chance to appear in the 4th bundle from the Loot Stash after defeating Klaus.

Shroom Skin is a major crafting ingredient of the Mushlight, the Glowcap and the Napsack. The Blueprints for the Mushlight and Glowcap are dropped when Toadstool is defeated, the Napsack blueprint when Misery Toadstool is defeated. There's also an 11% chance for either the Mushlight or Glowcap blueprint to show up in the 4th bundle of the Loot Stash (5.6% each).

Trivia

  • Shroom Skin was introduced in the Warts and All update.

The Blueprints for the Mushlight and Glowcap are dropped when Toadstool is defeated, the Napsack blueprint when Misery Toadstool is defeated. summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Skin Shroom là một Vật phẩm được tìm thấy trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong A New Reign. Nó rơi ra từ Toadstool khi còn 70% và 40% máu. Misery Toadstool rớt ra thêm một Skin Shroom với 20% máu. Một trang phục cũng có 20% cơ hội xuất hiện trong gói thứ 4 từ Kho Chiến lợi phẩm sau khi đánh bại Klaus.

'''Shroom Skin''' is an [[Item]] found in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It is dropped by [[Toadstool]] at 70% and 40% health. [[Misery Toadstool]] drops an additional Shroom Skin at 20% health. A skin also has a 20% chance to appear in the 4th bundle from the [[Loot Stash]] after defeating [[Klaus]].

Shroom Skin is a major crafting ingredient of the [[Mushlight]], the [[Glowcap]] and the [[Napsack]]. The [[Blueprint]]s for the Mushlight and Glowcap are dropped when Toadstool is defeated, the Napsack blueprint when Misery Toadstool is defeated. There's also an 11% chance for either the Mushlight or Glowcap blueprint to show up in the 4th bundle of the Loot Stash (5.6% each).

|resultcount = 4}}
